message:
fix: Robot mode fresh eyes review - usable profiles and watch errors

1. Fix usable profiles calculation: was incorrectly using
   HealthyProfiles - CooldownProfiles which doesn't account for
   unhealthy profiles in cooldown. Now correctly counts profiles
   that are healthy AND not in cooldown.

2. Handle encode errors in watch command: if stdout is closed
   (e.g., pipe broken), exit gracefully instead of looping forever.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
